blockingIssues.description: Duplicate pantry names are always inserted without a de-duplication or validation path (`src/actions/add-pantry-item.ts`), enabling confusing identical entries contrary to VAL-PAN-012.
Pantry rows render name-only display (`src/components/pantry-list.tsx`), so duplicate entries appear indistinguishable with no explanatory differentiation, violating VAL-PAN-012.
Cross-flow persistence checks in `src/__tests__/cross-flows.test.tsx` only assert in-memory render behavior and do not validate required refresh/sign-out/sign-in/concurrency persistence behaviors.
Delete-flow tests in `src/__tests__/cross-flows.test.tsx` do not navigate to `/recipes/[deleted-id]` post-delete, so required deleted-detail 404/redirect behavior is not actually verified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit fallback procedure for required authenticated agent-browser checks when Clerk/Cloudflare bot protection blocks headless sessions (e.g., mandated alternative evidence strategy and handoff wording).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Shared-state observations in recipe-conversion-page, recipes-list-and-detail, and conversion-cross-flows reviews all reported the same mismatch; `.factory/library/user-testing.md` also documents recurring Clerk headless challenge blocking authenticated automation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document this repo's middleware location convention explicitly (`src/middleware.ts`) to reduce implementation friction and unnecessary file lookups.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: recipes-list-and-detail review observed initial failed lookup at repo root (`middleware.ts`) before discovering the actual file at `src/middleware.ts`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated variants of the same agent-browser/Clerk headless challenge note across multiple review files.
General restatement that Clerk headless auth is blocked.
